education.degree: Bachelor of Arts and Science, Computer Science Specialist

highlighted_projects.description: Developed a tactical, turn-based game with a modifable enemy AI system that dynamically changes behavior to create engaging puzzle-solving challenges. Collaborated with a group of team until early launch on steam. •Built a modular level generator and flexible enemy patrol system, enabling seamless customization and scalability across multiple stages.
highlighted_projects.name: Into The Dataswarm

highlighted_projects.description: Built an AirBnB-style website for managing reservations, bookings, property listings, and user-host interactions. with a Django Backend integrated with a React Front End. The app has a responsive design that adapts seamlessly to various devices, delivering an optimized experience on both mobile and desktop.
highlighted_projects.name: Restify

jarvis_projects.description: This project is monitoring agent for the performance and CPU usage of various different docker applications. For setup, it uses an SQL docker image to ensure SQL database could run properly. It also uses a volume to allow for continous usage and multiple applications running. For implementation, It uses LINUX bash commands in order to obtain various statistics such as CPU usage and memory usage and periodically store them. Finally, crontab is used in order to automate the check. This project is created for users that wants to keep track of the usages of their various linux products and monitor them such that they can take action if it is underperforming or overperforming.
jarvis_projects.name: Cluster Monitor

jarvis_projects.description: Grep App: An application that allows for the use of the grep command in Linux by utilizing Java Files Objects along with Java Input and Output Stream. It takes in a file directory and a string then searches for it on all the files for a REGEX match then output it into an output file. The project itself is managed using Maven in order to manage its dependencies and uses SLFJ4 Logging in order to keep track of errors. It runs by taking in its parameters as command arguments.
jarvis_projects.name: Core Java Apps

jarvis_projects.description: In this project, I worked with a dataset from London Gift Shop in order to clean, process, and analyze the dataset to provide meaningful analysis as an external Data Engineer. To do so, I created a detailed Jupyter Notebook filled with RFM Segmentation Analysis, User Analysis, and Sales Analysis using Python Pandas library for data manipulation. Presented the information in a clear and conside way utilizing various graphs to showcase possible improvements to sales strategy to optimize revenue.
jarvis_projects.name: Python Data Analytics

jarvis_projects.description: In this project, I built an MVP trading application using Java and Spring Boot that is capable of retrieving real-time market quotes, process market orders, and manage trader accounts. The application follows a layered architecture consisting of controller, service, and data access layers, with Apache Tomcat handling HTTP requests and PostgreSQL serving as the database. Market data is integrated through external APIs (Finnhub and Finnage), and all endpoints are documented and testable via Swagger. I implemented RESTful controllers for quotes, traders, orders, and dashboard views, enabling account creation, deposits and withdrawals, order execution, and portfolio tracking. The system was fully containerized using Docker, with separate images for the Spring Boot application and the PostgreSQL database connected through a custom Docker network. Additionally, I wrote JUnit integration tests with a dedicated test database configuration, achieving approximately 70% test coverage.
jarvis_projects.name: Springboot Trading Apps

professional_experience.description: At the Office of the Governing Council, I managed Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics 4 to track and analyze user interactions on an internal Drupal website. I integrated GA4 data with Power BI to develop an automated, bimonthly website analytics report, and conducted Drupal testing to identify and document bugs, improving stability and user experience. Additionally, I diagnosed and resolved issues with the MERN-based OGC calendar application.
professional_experience.title: Office of The Governing Council
